title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean, discusses building two unicorns over 12 years. He emphasizes that success comes from focused execution and addressing real team pain points rather than building redundant solutions. Glean emerged from observing his own team's information retrieval struggles and is now valued at $7 billion.
